Package net.minestom.server.instance.block.predicate

  • Class
    Description
    BlockPredicate
    A predicate to filter blocks based on their name, properties, and/or nbt.
    CollectionPredicate<T, P extends Predicate<T>>
    A generic predicate to match against a collection of items.
    CollectionPredicate.Builder<T, P extends Predicate<T>>
     
    CollectionPredicate.Contains<T, P extends Predicate<T>>
    A predicate that requires that all of its sub-predicates match at least once.
    CollectionPredicate.Count<T, P extends Predicate<T>>
    A predicate that counts the number of matching sub-predicates and tests whether it's in the count range.
    CollectionPredicate.Count.Entry<T, P extends Predicate<T>>
     
    ComponentPredicateSet
    A list of DataComponentPredicates.
    DataComponentPredicate
    A partial predicate for the data components held by an item or block entity.
    DataComponentPredicate.ArmorTrim
    Tests armor trim material and pattern in the DataComponents.TRIM component.
    DataComponentPredicate.AttributeModifierPredicate
    Tests an attribute modifier.
    DataComponentPredicate.AttributeModifiers
    Tests attribute modifiers in the DataComponents.ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS component.
    DataComponentPredicate.BundleContents
    Tests the items in the DataComponents.BUNDLE_CONTENTS component.
    DataComponentPredicate.Container
    Tests the items in the DataComponents.CONTAINER component.
    DataComponentPredicate.CustomData
    Tests stored NBT data in the DataComponents.CUSTOM_DATA component
    DataComponentPredicate.Damage
    Tests damage or remaining durability.
    DataComponentPredicate.EnchantmentListPredicate
    Tests enchantments.
    DataComponentPredicate.Enchantments
    Tests an object's enchantments in its DataComponents.ENCHANTMENTS component.
    DataComponentPredicate.Exists
    Tests whether a data component is present, without inspecting its value.
    DataComponentPredicate.FireworkExplosion
    Tests the firework explosion in DataComponents.FIREWORK_EXPLOSION
    DataComponentPredicate.FireworkExplosionPredicate
     
    DataComponentPredicate.Fireworks
    Tests the firework explosions and flight duration in the DataComponents.FIREWORKS component.
    DataComponentPredicate.JukeboxPlayable
    Tests the jukebox song in the DataComponents.JUKEBOX_PLAYABLE component.
    DataComponentPredicate.Potions
    Tests stored potion types in the DataComponents.POTION_CONTENTS component.
    DataComponentPredicate.Registered
    A component predicate whose codec is registered in the data component predicate type registry.
    DataComponentPredicate.StoredEnchantments
    Tests an object's enchantments in its DataComponents.STORED_ENCHANTMENTS component.
    DataComponentPredicate.VillagerVariant
    Tests the villager variant in DataComponents.VILLAGER_VARIANT
    DataComponentPredicate.WritableBook
    Tests the content of pages in the DataComponents.WRITABLE_BOOK_CONTENT component.
    DataComponentPredicate.WritableBook.PagePredicate
     
    DataComponentPredicate.WrittenBook
    Tests the content of pages in the DataComponents.WRITTEN_BOOK_CONTENT component.
    DataComponentPredicate.WrittenBook.PagePredicate
     
    DataComponentPredicates
     
    NbtPredicate
     
    PropertiesPredicate
     
    PropertiesPredicate.ValuePredicate
     
    PropertiesPredicate.ValuePredicate.Exact
     
    PropertiesPredicate.ValuePredicate.Range
    Vanilla has some fancy behavior to get integer properties as ints, but seems to just compare the value anyway if its a string.
